issues.description: Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect. FlipLife only flips life cards; it does not add them to hand or allow reordering. The effect requires two distinct actions: (1) add 1 card from top/bottom of Life to hand, and (2) look at all Life cards and reorder them.
Missing the reordering mechanic entirely. The DSL must capture the ability to look at and rearrange all Life cards in any order.
No condition for the optional 'You may' clause. Should include a condition that makes this action optional.
